workspace.name: Game Portfolio Triage
workspace.notes: Candidate VeritySpec portfolio workspace draft generated from rough portfolio inputs. It is not a production or implementation readiness claim.

records.name: Game Concepts Portfolio
records.summary: A candidate portfolio contract for comparing rough Unity game concepts.

records.name: Initial Game Concepts
records.summary: Sample concept set containing Dream Extraction, Space Runners, and Farm Forge.

records.name: Dream Extraction
records.summary: Best-covered candidate in this example because it has a brief, rough GDD, and image notes.

records.name: Space Runners
records.summary: Arcade runner concept with only one-page pitch coverage.

records.name: Farm Forge
records.summary: Cozy crafting and farming concept with an economy sketch but missing visual identity.

records.name: Immediate Workspace Draft Candidates
records.summary: Dream Extraction is the only concept in this sample with enough source coverage to draft a candidate workspace without more interview first.

records.name: Art and Licensing Coverage Gap
records.summary: Binary image assets, licensing rights, commercial clearance, and accessibility review are unknown.

records.name: Portfolio Shared Unity Runtime Assumption
records.summary: The portfolio may use a shared Unity runtime, but package name, version, exported capabilities, and compatibility are unresolved.

records.name: Portfolio Concept Completeness Gap
records.summary: Several concepts require interviews and source-material cleanup before comparable VeritySpec workspaces can be drafted.
